understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by moving the available selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; completing a level requires all goals covered simultaneously, and completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you can either move the currently selected piece one tile in a cardinal direction (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) or use CLICK on a coordinate to select and/or attempt to move the selected piece to that target tile depending on the level’s rules; movement is prevented by walls/obstacles and other blocking geometry (resulting in 'did not change position'), and selecting between multiple pieces is done by clicking the piece’s position so subsequent moves apply to that piece. Pushing (when allowed by a level) would involve moving into an adjacent piece/object to shift it if the space beyond is free; otherwise the push/move is blocked.

history.summary: Level 1 attempt 2/2 failed after 64 turns. No attempts remaining.
Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to solve each level by moving the available selectable pieces so that every goal tile marked with a '+' is occupied by a selectable piece at the same time; completing a level requires all goals covered simultaneously, and completing all levels wins the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: On each turn you can either move the currently selected piece one tile in a cardinal direction (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) or use CLICK on a coordinate to select and/or attempt to move the selected piece to that target tile depending on the level’s rules; movement is prevented by walls/obstacles and other blocking geometry (resulting in 'did not change position'), and selecting between multiple pieces is done by clicking the piece’s position so subsequent moves apply to that piece. Pushing (when allowed by a level) would involve moving into an adjacent piece/object to shift it if the space beyond is free; otherwise the push/move is blocked.
